replies.msg:
I am running a Late 2013 13" rMBP with the i5-4258U, 2.4 base, 2.9 turbo with 8GB of ram and an external GTX 960.

Depends on the game you play. If those are AAA titles like GTA V or BF1, maybe a little bit. Most of the power is still coming from the GPU though. MOBA games will not be a problem for you. RAM should be fine for gaming, 8GB was enough for me until i started rendering stuff on Lightroom and stitching 80MP photos together.

Playing GTA V on 1440p with normal texture settings and no AA but almost everything on very high. Getting 35-60fps. I feel like the CPU bottlenecks here. But its still playable for me as GTA isnt a fast game. BF3 runs on 1440p at medium settings always over 60fps for me. You won't be disappointed. It may not be a quad core, but for a dual-core ultrabook, its hella fast.

我見人地再廢都無問題，應該玩到啦
唔洗睇粒u行幾多ghz，唔準的
